raw_consumer_statement: I used my Home Depot card to finance my new roof including materials and installation. The roof is leaking causing water damage inside and outside my house so I contacted Home Depot. They told me to contact XXXX Warranty Claims Dept which I did and as requested sent XXXX shingles purchased from Home Depot. In XX/XX/2023, XXXX for Claim No XXXX said there is nothing wrong with the shingles and the damage was caused by the installation of the roof. XXXX told me they would contact Home Depot. I have not heard back from XXXX or Home Depot. The roof is guaranteed for 16 years.
